description: Versioned engine manifest for the cardano-swiss-knife release. Each engine records its provenance, the exact flake.lock pin it must match, its protocol contract, responsibility, packaged artifact path, and fail-hard/no-fallback behavior. The release checker verifies revision and narHash against the top-level flake.lock on every run.

engines.protocolContract: wasm32-wasi reactor; invoked through the Cardano.Address.* PureScript FFI for address, mnemonic, key-derivation, script, and payload signing semantics.
engines.responsibility: Address and cryptographic semantics: bech32/base58 address inspection, BIP-39 mnemonic generation/validation, Shelley/Icarus/Byron key derivation and address construction, native-script analysis, and payload signing/verification.
engines.failHard: Engine load, compatibility, execution, and protocol failures surface as typed ENGINE_* errors; no host-side substitute for address/crypto semantics is permitted.

engines.protocolContract: wasm32-wasi reactor speaking the tx-inspector JSON protocol over stdin/stdout ({ tx_cbor, op, args } -> { stdout, stderr, exitOk }); driven by runInspector/runLedgerOperation for the tx.* operation family.
engines.responsibility: Conway ledger semantics: transaction CBOR decoding, inspection/browse/identify/intent, ledger validation, witness planning and attachment, and script evaluation.

embeddedPlutus.description: The pinned Haskell build embeds the Plutus evaluator libraries transitively via the pinned cardano-ledger-wasm input (rev 5897e8da1c043eb53cdafa6ada9782b56c74b18e), whose build-depends include plutus-ledger-api together with cardano-ledger-api, cardano-ledger-conway, cardano-ledger-core, cardano-ledger-alonzo, cardano-ledger-shelley, cardano-ledger-mary, and cardano-ledger-binary, resolved from CHaP at the pinned index-state.
embeddedPlutus.note: There is no separate Plutus WASI artifact; Plutus script execution is embedded in wasm-tx-inspector.wasm and no alternate Plutus artifact may be substituted.

engines.failHard: Engine load, compatibility, execution, and protocol failures surface as typed ENGINE_* errors; no host-side substitute for ledger/CBOR/validation/Plutus semantics is permitted.

engines.protocolContract: wasm-bindgen ES module (@lambdasistemi/rdf-shapes-wasm, main rdf_shapes_wasm.js) loaded by Cardano.Transaction.Rdf.js / node/src/rdf-engine.js for SPARQL/SHACL resolution.
engines.responsibility: RDF/SPARQL/SHACL semantics: transaction RDF graph label resolution, book/blueprint resolution, and SHACL validation.
engines.failHard: Engine load, compatibility, execution, and protocol failures surface as typed RDF_ENGINE_* errors; no host-side substitute for RDF/SPARQL/SHACL semantics is permitted.
